tinker.name: Media Converter
tinker.description: Batch media format conversion powered by FFmpeg

zh-CN.name: 媒体格式转换
zh-CN.description: 基于 FFmpeg 的批量媒体格式转换

convert.description: Start a batch media conversion in the background. Returns immediately — call get_status to poll until isComplete is true. Fails if a conversion is already running. Mode is auto-detected from paths; all paths must be the same media type.

paths.description: Absolute paths to media files of the same type (video, audio, or image)

mode.description: Media type. Auto-detected from paths when omitted; must match the files when provided.

format.description: Output format for the resolved media type. Video: mp4-h264, mp4-h265, mp4-av1, mkv-h264, mkv-h265, mkv-vp9, mkv-av1, webm-vp9, webm-vp8, webm-av1, mov-h264, mov-h265, mov-prores, avi-h264, avi-xvid, avi-mpeg4, flv-h264, flv-sorenson, ts-h264, ts-h265, wmv, 3gp, gif. Audio: mp3, m4a, aac, ogg, flac, wav, opus. Image: jpg, png, webp, bmp, tiff, avif. Defaults to the last used format for that type.

outputDirectory.description: Absolute output directory. Empty string writes next to each source file. Defaults to the last used output directory.

get_status.description: Get conversion progress. Poll after convert until isComplete is true. Returns per-file progress, output paths, and errors.

cancel.description: Cancel the conversion currently in progress.
